---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Font Pond
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to see?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Why would this be useful?**
Explain the use case or problem it would solve.

**Additional context**
Any mockups, examples, or references that might be helpful.

---

*Note: Font Pond is a solo project. Feature requests are welcome but there is no guarantee of implementation or timeline.*
